expectedNotes.propNotes: Context-provider props come from `PropsWithChildren<IAccordionContext<any>>`, including `expandedSections`, header/panel/trigger prop getters, `level`, and accordion mode flags such as `isBare`, `isAnimated`, `isCollapsible`, and `isCompact`.
Should expose required `type`, optional `role`, inherited div attributes from `IAlertProps`, and the forwarded alert wrapper props.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the alert body content.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Should expose local props `isExternal`, `externalIconLabel`, `isDanger`, and `isUnderlined`, plus inherited anchor attributes from `AnchorHTMLAttributes<HTMLAnchorElement>`.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the anchor content.

expectedNotes.propNotes: This wrapper accepts `HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCaptionElement>`, so it should expose inherited caption attributes.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the caption content.

expectedNotes.propNotes: This wrapper accepts `HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>`, so it should expose inherited div attributes.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the body content.

expectedNotes.propNotes: This wrapper accepts `HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>`, so it should expose inherited div attributes.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the global alert body content.

expectedNotes.propNotes: This wrapper accepts `HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement>`, so it should expose inherited table-row attributes.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the row cells.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Should expose local `isRegular` and `hidden`, plus inherited label attributes from `ILabelProps`.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the label content.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Local prop is `validation`, with values from the `VALIDATION` union.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot when no validation state is provided.

expectedNotes.propNotes: This wrapper accepts `HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>`, so it should expose inherited paragraph attributes.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the paragraph content.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Should expose local `sort`, `width`, and `cellProps`, plus inherited button attributes from `ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>`.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for the sortable cell label.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Should expose `isCompact` plus inherited input attributes from `IToggleProps` such as `checked`, `disabled`, `name`, `value`, and `onChange`.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slot for adjacent toggle content.
